headline: Breakthrough drug wins fast-track nod
body: Fast-track approval by National Drug Authority; rollout in 3 months.

headline: Phase-2 trial clearance
body: Permission granted to commence Phase-2 clinical study; enrollment within 1 month.

headline: ₹5,000 cr expressway LoA
body: LoA received for expressway package; commissioning within 6 months.

headline: Smart city redevelopment MoU
body: MoU signed; value expected ~₹2,000 cr; execution timeline to be decided.

headline: Strategic AI partnership announced
body: Long-term strategic AI partnership to accelerate innovation; details confidential; go-live soon.

headline: Green bond backing for solar expansion
body: Backed by leading lenders; tranche-I to close in 2 months; for 200MW expansion.

headline: Acquires minority stake in FinServCo
body: Bank to acquire 9.9% in FinServCo subject to regulatory approval; closing in 4 months.

headline: National distribution tie-up
body: Enters national distribution with StarRetail chain; phased rollout in 2 months.

headline: Wins 3.5GHz spectrum in auction
body: Allotted 40MHz nationwide; service launch within 6 months.

headline: 2 MTPA capacity expansion plan
body: Brownfield expansion; EPC partner to be finalized; staged commissioning over 12 months.

headline: Joint venture for EV powertrains
body: JV with ElectroDrive for EV motors; first pilot in 5 months.

headline: City gas license extension granted
body: License extended by 5 years; compliance certificate attached.
